cross_split_exact_duplicates.interpretation: Exact modeling-row plus target duplicates cross split boundaries.

target_in_features.interpretation: No direct target column is selected.

deterministic_or_near_target_numeric_fea.interpretation: No selected numeric feature is nearly identical to price.

future_or_listing_history_columns.interpretation: Selected RF features exclude declared full-history leakage-risk columns.

split_specific_preparation.interpretation: Selected RF features do not use date offsets; imputers and encoders are fit inside train-only pipelines.
